notes: Set PROG from the thermal envelope, not only the desired charge time.
Validate cell chemistry, protection, temperature monitoring, and source-current limits at system level.

checks.name: official source identity
checks.method: Reviewed the official manufacturer document and recorded its revision, locators, retrieval state, and hash when byte capture succeeded.

checks.name: pin and package extraction
checks.method: Compared the package-specific pin map with the manufacturer pin table and package section.

checks.name: independent engineering review
checks.method: No second human review, specimen inspection, footprint fit, assembly trial, or electrical qualification belongs to this record yet.

known_issues.summary: Charge current is thermally regulated and this suffix has no battery-temperature input or safety timer; cell protection and system-level charge safety remain external design requirements.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization based on the linked official manufacturer source.
